definition:
1. to join  or assist in accomplishing , (Euripides):—;Mid., συμπεραίνεσθαί τινι ἔχθραν to join fully in  enmity with  another, (Demosthenes Orator) 
2. to decide  or conclude absolutely , ς. φροντίδα to make up one's mind, (Euripides); κλῇθρα μοχλοῖς ς. to make  the doors doubly sure  by bars, (Euripides):—;Pass. to be quite finished , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
